PowerShell($ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; $base = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@fontsource/nunito-sans/files'; $weights = @\('400','500','600','700'\); foreach \($w in $weights\) { $url = "$base/nunito-sans-latin-$w-normal.ttf"; $out = "c:\\Users\\elmof\\meme-chat-ai\\assets\\fonts\\NunitoSans-$w.ttf"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $out -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "OK $w $\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length\)" } catch { Write-Host "FAIL $w $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
